feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: Which edge prospect in the 2027 NFL Draft that would help the Vikings?
entry.content: Here is one EDGE prospect in the 2027 NFL Draft Vikings fans should keep tabs on.

entry.title: Why Passing Is So Hard with the NASCAR Next Gen on Short Tracks
entry.content: It's no secret that the NASCAR Next Gen car has had a hard time on short tracks and road courses because it's so hard to pass. Let's dig into the details of how yaw angle and downforce impact passing on short tracks and what the latest solution from NASCAR will do.

entry.title: MLB pays tribute to former Red's 'greatest statistical season' ever
entry.content: MLB paid tribute to Gary Redus' 1978 season for the Billings Mustangs, calling it "the greatest statistical season in professional baseball history."

entry.title: Caitlin Clark vs. Angel Reese beef history, explained: What WNBA rivals have said since 2023 NCAA championship
entry.content: Explaining the history between Fever's Caitlin Clark and Sky's Angel Reese, which started with the 2023 national championship game.

entry.title: Bearden's Jayla Blue is Gatorade Tennessee Girls Soccer Player of the Year
entry.content: Bearden senior and Tennessee signee Jayla Blue was named the Gatorade Tennessee Girls Soccer Player of the Year

entry.title: Pinehurst golfer Jackson Van Paris one off lead at US Open after birdie
entry.content: Pinehurst's Jackson Van Paris got on the leaderboard early at the US Open. Here's what happened.

entry.title: Here's Zohran Mamdani's complete championship parade speech that has Knicks fans losing their minds
entry.content: Here's what the New York City mayor said at the Knicks parade.

entry.title: 'City united after so long': New Yorkers rejoice in Knicks' championship parade
entry.content: The New York Knicks won the NBA Finals on Saturday, generating a citywide energy that culminated in a massive parade on Thursday.

entry.title: Dodgers get exciting Tarik Skubal trade deadline claim from ex-MLB GM
entry.content: The Dodgers can't be counted out just yet in the Skubal sweepstakes.

entry.title: Watch Live: Obama Presidential Center opening ceremony
entry.content: The Obama Presidential Center, museum and library opens in Chicago with a star-studded grand opening ceremony and public watch party on Midway Plaisance.

entry.title: World Cup group scenarios 2026: How teams can qualify and advance to Round of 32 knockout bracket
entry.content: As the World Cup group stages enters its second round of matches, some nations will be booking their places in the knockout stages, while others will be heading home.

entry.title: Live Updates: Knicks celebrate championship win with parade in NYC
entry.content: The New York Knicks are being honored with a ticker-tape parade Thursday through the Canyon of Heroes in Lower Manhattan.

entry.title: Red Wings get Patrick Kane retirement, free agent update
entry.content: Detroit got a solid 2025-26 season out of the star winger.

entry.title: Canada vs. Qatar projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup 2026 Group B game at BC Place
entry.content: After securing their first-ever World Cup point to begin their 2026 FIFA World Cup slate, co-hosts Canada now press on in the pursuit of a knockout stage place as they meet 2022 hosts Qatar on Thursday in Vancouver.

entry.title: Where to watch Canada vs. Qatar live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Group B match
entry.content: Canada vs. Qatar kickoff time: Here's how to watch the World Cup match on TV and live stream. The Sporting News takes you through all the information you need to follow the game.

entry.title: Alperen Sengun may be Celtics' alternate blockbuster if trade talks for Giannis Antetokounmpo fall apart this offseason
entry.content: If Celtics miss on Giannis, Sengun could complete their Mazzulla Ball vision.

entry.title: Dodgers have simple three-word answer to trade deadline question
entry.content: This trade deadline plan for the Dodgers might be a very quiet one.

entry.title: Phoenix Suns' Devin Booker making major change for 2026-27 NBA season
entry.content: Booker's uniform with the Suns will have a different look next season.

entry.title: How to find the highest CD interest rate this June
entry.content: Interest rates on CDs will stay high after this week's Fed meeting. Here's how to find the highest ones right now.

entry.title: Waymo recalls robotaxis after some vehicles entered construction zone
entry.content: The recall follows multiple incidents in which Waymo robotaxis drove past ramp-closure signs and into freeway construction zones.

entry.title: Apple opens up third-party app stores in Brazil
entry.content: Third-party iOS app stores are coming to Brazil.

entry.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic ramps up in wake of U.S.-Iran deal signing
entry.content: More tankers are transiting the Strait of Hormuz after 111 days of gridlock, but Iran and the U.S. still have much to discuss.

entry.title: Rivian owners sue over false promises on self-driving features
entry.content: Plaintiffs in the class action complaint allege Rivian falsely promised for years it would bring hands-free driving to its first-generation R1 vehicles.

entry.title: Mivo’s new app takes a mindful approach to managing screen time
entry.content: Doomscrolling on social media is a very common problem and can feel like an endless loop of constantly losing track of time. Instead of tackling this issue with strict limits, a new mindful screen time app called Mivo Scrolling is trying to shake things up. Launched last month, Mivo doesn’t look super different from other […]

entry.title: AI data centers just got a government-mandated fast lane to the grid
entry.content: FERC told grid operators to give data centers a fast lane for interconnections, but it failed to address electricity supply shortages.

entry.title: Apple TV will broadcast the Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix for free
entry.content: Apple TV will show Formula 1's Australia Grand Prix for free, even to non-subscribers.

entry.title: The smartphone era created an attention crisis. Slowtech is fixing it
entry.content: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

entry.title: Texas government data breach allowed hackers to steal 3 million driver’s licenses and passports
entry.content: A data breach involving government-issued ID documents affects over three million people in Texas.

entry.title: ‘Queer Eye’s’ life coach Karamo Brown launches Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone
entry.content: Karamo Brown, famous for his pep talks on Netflix’s “Queer Eye,” has jumped into the wellness and AI space with his new app, Kē. After spending a year and a half focusing on his own journey—from fitness and nutrition to meditation, sobriety, relationships, and personal growth—Brown wants to help others do the same. Kē offers […]

entry.title: Google Calendar lets you use any color you want for your events
entry.content: Your Google Calendar is about to get a lot more colorful.

entry.title: Supreme Court Rules Government Can’t Ban All Drug Users from Owning Guns
entry.content: The decision sides with Texas marijuana user who challenged his prosecution.

entry.title: Apple opens up App Store to new competition in Brazil
entry.content: Apple’s grip on iPhone app distribution is loosening in another major market: Brazil.

entry.title: MapTap, a daily geography game, is my new Wordle
entry.content: MapTap is a phone game that will make you feel smarter after you play it.

entry.title: See How the Supreme Court Has Decided the Major Cases of This Term
entry.content: A visual roundup of a Supreme Court term marked by politically charged disputes, including tests of presidential power, LGBTQ rights and U.S. election laws.

entry.title: General Intuition in talks to raise $300M at around $2B valuation
entry.content: General Intuition is in talks to raise around $300 million at a roughly $2 billion valuation from backers including Jeff Bezos. The startup trains AI agents on spatial-temporal reasoning.

entry.title: A tech worker-backed PAC is bringing a $5M knife to Big Tech’s $100M gunfight
entry.content: Guardrails positions itself as a populist political movement that runs on small donations from people in the trenches of the AI boom.

entry.title: Yankees-Nationals trade pitch sends $4.2M All-Star to New York to part ways with Anthony Volpe
entry.content: The Yankees are about ready to move on from Anthony Volpe. This trade prediction allows them to part ways for Volpe in return for an All-Star with a bright future.

entry.title: The head of the family is 17. Money is tight. The roof leaks. How did this happen?
entry.content: Three brothers say their mother and father died after losing access to their HIV medications. Now the boys are figuring out how to navigate life.

entry.title: Trae Young free agency destinations: Evaluating Wizards, Heat, Lakers, Nets, and Bulls as options
entry.content: Why Trae Young decided to pass up a guaranteed $49 million for the 2026-27 season and where the free agent may land.

entry.title: Blue Jays predicted to trade for $32M two-time Cy Young winner in move to alter season trajectory
entry.content: The Toronto Blue Jays are starting to get healthy. In this trade idea they land a power arm that would make them the best starting rotation in baseball.

entry.title: Cubs reveal 'top priority' for MLB trade deadline
entry.content: Chicago has a very clear need.

entry.title: Warriors predicted to outbid Lakers, Spurs for $101M former MVP, four-time NBA champion
entry.content: The Golden State Warriors are going all in to get Steph Curry and Draymond one more ring. In this free agency move, they are able to bring another legend on the roster.

entry.title: Seahawks urged to extend key defender, but not Devon Witherspoon
entry.content: This Seahawks defender is a key player to lock up for the next few years.

entry.title: Pirates 'concentrating' on this area of their roster at MLB trade deadline
entry.content: Pittsburgh can make a serious run in 2026.

entry.title: How Shohei Ohtani 'pinch hit' during game Dodgers' two-way star started as pitcher
entry.content: MLB Rule 5.11(a) allows MLB managers to remove the DH and allow pitchers to hit.

entry.title: How Gilberto Mora's age compares to Messi, Ronaldo and youngest World Cup debuts ever
entry.content: Mexico's phenom at the 2026 World Cup is set to go down as one of the youngest participants ever.

entry.title: Arsenal is not afraid to pay a huge fee for teenage forward
entry.content: Eli Junior Kroupi has emerged as one of the most sought-after young players in European football following a superb maiden season in the Premier League with Bournemouth.The Frenchman enjoyed a remarka...

entry.title: Flick views Barcelona captain as fifth-choice option ahead of the new season – report
entry.content: Barcelona have several issues to solve in terms of their squad ahead of the new season, both in terms of signings and sales.There are some players whose prominence has grown in the last 12 months, and...

entry.title: Report: Austin Reaves could leave Lakers if contract offer is too low
entry.content: According to one reporter, a low-ball contract offer from the Lakers could cause Austin Reaves to leave in free agency.

entry.title: NBA mock draft 1st round. Who's No. 1 among Dybantsa, Peterson, Boozer?
entry.content: Our latest NBA mock draft has Cameron Boozer, AJ Dybantsa and Darryn Peterson going in first three picks, but in what order?

entry.title: Lakers reportedly in contract talks to re-sign $205M core trio amid free agency decisions
entry.content: The Lakers have a big offseason ahead and it seems like they are already trying to sign back some key players. This is going to be a very crucial summer for LA and they are already getting to it.

entry.title: New York Giants' Mike Bloomgren giddy over coaching Francis Mauigoa
entry.content: New York Giants OL coach Mike Bloomgren was overjoyed by the selection of Francis Mauigoa on draft night.

entry.title: Legislation overhauling college sports faces a major test in the Senate
entry.content: A bill that top lawmakers and athletic leaders have described as the best chance to stabilize college sports faces a key test in the Senate on Thursday as sponsors roll out a revised version after weeks of input from schools, conferences and athletes. The bipartisan Protect College Sports Act aims to regulate payments to players, limit them to one free transfer over their careers and create a rule to restrict coaches from changing jobs during a season. The Senate Commerce Committee will debate the latest version of the bill on Thursday before potentially voting on whether to send it to the full Senate for consideration.

entry.title: Pixi’s new iOS app turns text messages into interactive AR experiences
entry.content: Forget stickers, GIFs, and emoji reactions. Pixi is betting that the next evolution of messaging is interactive augmented reality (AR).

entry.title: Waymo recalls nearly 4,000 robotaxis to stop them driving into highway construction zones
entry.content: The company has identified at least 13 instances where its robotaxis drove into highway sections closed for construction.

entry.title: Giverny Capital Asset Management Trimmed Its Stake in Installed Building Products (IBP) in Q1
entry.content: Giverny Capital Asset Management Trimmed Its Stake in Installed Building Products (IBP) in Q1

entry.title: Bitcoin and ethereum prices today, Thursday, June 18, 2026: Prices sliding despite Iran peace deal
entry.content: Bitcoin and ethereum prices today, Thursday, June 18, 2026: Prices sliding despite Iran peace deal

entry.title: Renaissance Investment Management Expects Positive Upward Revision for Lam Research (LRCX)
entry.content: Renaissance Investment Management Expects Positive Upward Revision for Lam Research (LRCX)

entry.title: Waymo recalls over 3,800 robotaxis that might drive onto closed freeways
entry.content: Waymo is recalling over 3,800 of its self-driving taxis due to a software issue that could cause them to enter closed freeway construction zones at speed.

entry.title: Exclusive: Registered sex offender in line to be Florida town's manager
entry.content: Exclusive: Registered sex offender in line to be Florida town's manager

entry.title: Stock Market Today: Gasoline Prices Fall Below $4
entry.content: Stocks poised to reverse yesterday's slide after Iran deal is signed

entry.title: Tornadoes reported in Illinois, Iowa as severe weather roils Midwest
entry.content: Confirmed tornadoes were reported in Illinois and Iowa Wednesday as severe weather brought the risk of thunderstorms and prompted a flurry of tornado warnings for a large swath of the Midwest​.

entry.title: NASA picks Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for Mars mission, setting up a race with SpaceX
entry.content: Relativity Space—a rocket maker acquired by former Google executive chair Eric Schmidt last year after stumbling on the path to orbit—might just beat SpaceX to Mars.

entry.title: With a sledgehammer and a shovel, volunteers raced to save passengers in Texas plane crash
entry.content: Several motorists who happened across a fiery plane crash on a Texas highway rushed to help — putting their own lives in danger to help those on board escape

entry.title: Tropical Storm Arthur weakens off Texas' Gulf Coast
entry.content: Tropical Storm Arthur, the first named storm of the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season, formed Wednesday off the Gulf Coast of Texas before later weakening to a post-tropical cyclone.

entry.title: Wall Street Hiring Dilemma: AI Can Model—but Can’t Make—the Next Rainmaker
entry.content: Executives are reluctant to slash jobs, with rainmakers often starting out as junior bankers performing rote tasks.

entry.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
entry.content: Here's what you need to do to get those pesky "write with Gemini" pop-ups to go away.

entry.title: South Australia premier says youth social media ban is working, 6 months later
entry.content: Six months after Australia implemented the world's first-ever social media ban for kids under 16, South Australia Premier Peter Malinauskas joins "The Daily Report" to discuss the changes he's seen among teens.

entry.title: Breaking down the powers of a grand jury as DOJ allegedly investigates Gavin Newsom
entry.content: California Gov. Gavin Newsom and his wife are the latest White House adversaries to claim they are now under investigation by the Justice Department. The DOJ has not commented on Newsom's claim. The alleged investigation has raised questions about the powers of a federal grand jury. CBS News legal contributor Jessica Levinson breaks it all down.

entry.title: Breaking down the preliminary U.S.-Iran deal as Trump, Iranian president sign remotely
entry.content: A White House official tells CBS News that President Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian remotely signed a memorandum of understanding to end the Iran war. Eric Lob, associate professor of politics and international relations at Florida International University, joins with analysis.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
If you want to be beautiful, you have to laugh.
Lucky Numbers: 72, 10, 6, 87, 80, 19

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Expecting mothers can eat bananas between meals to avoid morning sickness.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: In York, it is perfectly legal to shoot a Scotsman with a bow and arrow (except on Sundays)

entry.title: Quote of the Day — D. H. Lawrence
entry.content: “But better die than live mechanically a life that is a repetition of repetitions.” — D. H. Lawrence

entry.title: AI is hurting Apple in more ways than one: it may force iPhone price increases
entry.content: CEO Tim Cook said in a recent interview that the situation is "unsustainable."

entry.title: Cargo ship's chief engineer charged in 2024 Francis Scott Key bridge collapse
entry.content: Prosecutors have charged the chief engineer of the cargo ship Dali in connection with the 2024 collapse of Baltimore’s Francis Scott Key Bridge

entry.title: How mistrust and war are fueling a deadly Ebola outbreak
entry.content: Efforts to stop Central Africa's deadly Ebola outbreak face widespread mistrust and porous borders in a war zone.

entry.title: How Trump's memo of understanding with Iran compares to the Obama nuclear deal
entry.content: The Obama-era Iran deal was packed with technical details and specific requirements limiting, but not shutting down, Iran's nuclear program. President Trump's new agreement is more of a framework, and it's not final yet.

entry.title: Trump jokes he'll blame Vance if Iran deal falls through
entry.content: President Trump on Wednesday jokingly said he'll blame Vice President JD Vance if the preliminary deal with Iran falls through. Political strategists Matt Whitlock and Kendra Barkoff Lamy join with analysis.

entry.title: Fed keeps interest rates steady in first decision under Kevin Warsh
entry.content: As was widely expected, the Federal Reserve unanimously voted to keep interest rates unchanged on Wednesday. CBS News coordinating producer Richard Escobedo has more details.

entry.title: Why Trump told DNI pick Jay Clayton to skip Senate hearing
entry.content: The Senate delayed its confirmation hearing Wednesday for director of national intelligence nominee Jay Clayton after Republican Sen. Tom Cotton said President Trump directed Clayton not to appear. CBS News congressional reporter Taurean Small has the latest.

entry.title: When will gas prices return to pre-Iran war levels?
entry.content: Oil prices are falling as the end of the war with Iran seems in sight. Arjun Murti, partner at the energy firm Veriten and the author of the Substack newsletter "Super-Spiked," joins to break down when you can expect the pain at the pump to ease.

entry.title: Veteran speaks out on wife's ICE detention, possible deportation: "It makes me sick to my stomach"
entry.content: ICE recently detained the wife of a retired Army staff sergeant and could deport her, despite her husband's nearly two decades of service to the U.S. CBS News immigration correspondent Camilo Montoya-Galvez has the story.

entry.title: French president urges U.S. to share cutting-edge AI and democracies to cooperate on regulation
entry.content: French President Emmanuel Macron on Wednesday urged the world's wealthy democracies to work together on regulating advanced artificial intelligence systems, speaking at a high-level meeting that included top AI executives.

entry.title: Tim Cook says Apple price increases are 'unavoidable' due to memory crunch
entry.content: RAMaggedon claims another one.

entry.title: Why recess is important for kids
entry.content: You may think school recess is just time for play, but the American Academy of Pediatrics is re-emphasizing that it's important for kids' health. Bradley Blackburn explains why.

entry.title: Rex Heuermann sentenced to life in prison for Gilgo Beach serial killings
entry.content: Rex Heuermann was sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole for the series of murders known as the Gilgo Beach serial killings.

entry.title: Fed holds rates steady, pares down statement to remove cutting bias
entry.content: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its interest rate decision.

entry.title: This law firm has deep ties to Trump. Now a partner is his pick for a top job.
entry.content: Jamie McDonald, a partner at the firm Sullivan & Cromwell, is President Trump's choice to helm one of the nation's most prestigious federal prosecutors' offices.

entry.title: Federal Reserve holds interest rates steady but leaves door open to hike
entry.content: U.S. inflation is expected to remain elevated through the end of the year, Fed officials say in their latest forecast.

entry.title: All detainees from immigration facility 'Alligator Alcatraz' have been transferred, DHS says
entry.content: Detainees at an immigration detention center in the Florida Everglades, known as “Alligator Alcatraz,” have been transferred to other facilities, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security said, citing concerns related to the hurricane season

entry.title: Brazil's Lula warns Trump not to meddle in Brazil's elections
entry.content: Brazilian President Lula da Silva has warned U.S. President Donald Trump not to interfere in Brazil's upcoming presidential election

entry.title: US in talks with Jamaica to send third-country migrants as rift widens in Caribbean
entry.content: Jamaica is discussing with the United States the acceptance of third-country deportees

entry.title: Man who died in Texas plane crash was a key figure in seeding Austin's technology boom
entry.content: The man who died in this week's crash of a small jet in Texas was a well-known entrepreneur named Joshua Baer who was a successful investor in technology startup companies

entry.title: What Iran gains from preliminary deal with U.S. as details go public
entry.content: Senior U.S. officials dictated the U.S.-Iran memorandum of understanding on a call with reporters Wednesday. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Samantha Vinograd have the latest.

entry.title: Warsh announces plan to reshape Federal Reserve
entry.content: The Federal Reserve unanimously voted Wednesday to keep interest rates unchanged. It was the first rate decision under the new chair, Kevin Warsh. CBS News MoneyWatch correspondent Kelly O'Grady has the details.

entry.title: Chi-Hua Chien saw Facebook coming — now he says the real AI winners won’t be selling AI
entry.content: Chi-Hua Chien has spent more than two decades as a venture capitalist, but he thinks like a cultural anthropologist.

entry.title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors
entry.content: The former Sequoia Capital leader is filling an "existing vacancy" on SpaceX's board, days after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.

entry.title: Titan sub: design flaws and company groupthink central to catastrophe, report finds
entry.content: Canadian officials find structural defects in material used for hull and say firm failed to fully test ‘novel’ designCanadian safety officials have issued a damning report on the catastrophic final voyage of the Titan submersible, finding that the US company behind the expedition was overcome by “groupthink” and “confirmation bias” and failed to understand the profound risks confronting their largely untested craft.The 6.7-metre (22ft) carbon fibre submersible dipped below the surface of the Atlantic Ocean in June 2023 en route to the wreckage of the Titanic ocean liner. But nearly two hours after it departed with five passengers, communications went dark. The disappearance prompted a frantic international search, with Canada and the US marshalling all available resources. Continue reading...

entry.title: White House officials unveil details of 14-point plan with Iran
entry.content: Senior White House officials detailed the 14-point memorandum of understanding between the U.S. and Iran following President Donald Trump’s remarks at the G7 summit. NBC News reports on whether the U.S. will allow any nuclear program in Iran of any kind and when military personnel could return home from the region.
